Alien: Covenant (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $74,262,031Details
International Box Office $164,259,216
Worldwide Box Office $238,521,247
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,575,399
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $14,898,598
Total $19,473,997
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, the crew of the colony ship Covenant discovers what they think is an uncharted paradise, but is actually a dark, dangerous world—whose sole inhabitant is the “synthetic” David, survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$36,160,621 (48.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$97,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,761 opening theaters/3,772 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $99,016,039

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 19th, 2017 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: May 4th, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
May 12th, 2017 (Wide) (Lithuania)
May 12th, 2017 (Wide) (Indonesia)
May 12th, 2017 (Wide) (Poland)
May 12th, 2017 (Wide) (India)
Video Release: August 15th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sci-fi violence, bloody images, language and some sexuality/nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2473 (Cert #50665), 4/26/2017)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Franchise: Alien
Cast, crew, or production detail: Inbetwequel, Same Actor, Multiple Roles
Film format: 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: Outer Space
Plot point: Alien Encounters, Archaeology, Humans as Aliens, Monster, Robot, Trapped
Social setting: Space Colonization
Subgenre: Survival Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Scott Free Films, TSG Entertainment, Brandywine
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, the crew of the colony ship Covenant discovers what they think is an uncharted paradise, but is actually a dark, dangerous world—whose sole inhabitant is the “synthetic” David, survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$36,160,621 (48.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$97,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,761 opening theaters/3,772 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $99,016,039

May 12th, 2017 (Wide) (India)

MPA Rating: R for sci-fi violence, bloody images, language and some sexuality/nudity.

Genre:Horror

Languages: English
